supersedes.supersededReason: TRU-86 — gatedSwap gained (address payer, address tokenIn, uint256 amountIn) so the router can pull ERC20 input from the kernel before forwarding to UR. v1's path forwarded UR calldata via low-level call with msg.sender=router, but UR's Permit2 transferFrom resolved payer=msg.sender (the router, holding zero tokens), reverting every ERC20-input swap. v2 also pre-approves Permit2 + UR for WETH/USDC in the constructor and exposes a permissionless setApprovals(token) for forward-compat. New constructor signature → new bytecode → new CREATE2 address.
